Package space.sunqian.fs.utils.eventbus

package space.sunqian.fs.utils.eventbus
Provides simple event bus interface and default implementation:
  • SimpleEventBus: Simple event bus interface;
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    space.sunqian.fs.utils
    This package and its subpackages contain common non-core tools, including: space.sunqian.fs.utils.codec: For codec; space.sunqian.fs.utils.eventbus: Provides simple event-bus interfaces and implementations; space.sunqian.fs.utils.jdbc: Package for JDBC and SQL; space.sunqian.fs.utils.version: Semantic version; And a utilities kit for common operations: UtilKit.
    space.sunqian.fs.utils.codec
    Provides utilities for codec, including crypto, base64, hex, etc.
    space.sunqian.fs.utils.jdbc
    This package provides JDBC and SQL utilities for database operations, for example:
    space.sunqian.fs.utils.version
    Provides classes and interfaces for semantic versioning.
  • Class
    Description
    EventBusException
    Exception for event bus.
    SimpleEventBus
    This interface is a simplified event bus interface.
    SimpleEventBus.DispatchMode
    The dispatch mode for posting events.
